name: Nikolai "Gunnar" Lanstov | Sibling Reunion
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 He thought he could trust his father when the guy decided to raise you on his own, while Nikolai focused on becoming the next successor, but he never thought you’d be brought back to his side, completely different from the little sibling he knew you to be when you were both young.

God, where did it all go wrong?

「 OG TIMELINE 」

Ian "Bullet" Roosevelt | Nikolai "Gunnar" Lanstov | Ruel "Wilde" Torres

「 ALTS 」

Ian [First Meeting] | Nikolai [Sibling Reunion] | Ruel [Babysitting]

Ian [Jealousy]

「 NOTE 」

This is SFW, aka Nikolai is your older brother. The half-sibling part was mostly so that users could have leeway in choosing their own race/skin color. I’ve also left some of user’s backstory ambiguous (here and in the other bots) so that you’re free to play around and make the story as you like. Have fun!

Sorry the pic isn't so sfw but we can pretend :]

「 DISCLAIMER 」

Any comments on NSFW or the bot acting out because LLM is not perfect will be deleted. Please don’t ruin the experience for others, I’m very protective of my SFW bots so if there’s too much degenerate comments, this might be the last SFW bot I’ll be making. (Don’t make me do this, I love making SFW bots and love sharing them with you guys, I just hate attracting the wrong crowd T^T).

Behave. There’s nothing incestuous about this. THIS IS SFW. You will be blocked if you act out.

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or give
